UserProgress.title: User Progress
UserProgress.description: Tracks a user's progress through the textbook chapters and quiz scores.

userId.description: The unique ID of the user.

completedChapters.description: List of chapter IDs the user has successfully completed.

quizScores.description: A map of chapter IDs to the user's highest quiz score.

Highlight.title: Highlight
Highlight.description: Represents text highlighted by the user in the textbook chapters.

id.description: The unique ID of the highlight.

sectionId.description: The associated section ID (e.g., intro, concepts, build, questions, terms).

selectedText.description: The raw chunk of text highlighted by the user.

/userProgress/{userId}.description: Stores progress data for each individual user.

/highlights/{highlightId}.description: Stores text highlights and user annotations.
